purpose: Validate public-safe corpus readiness metadata for explicit Mathlib absence, translation-smoke boundaries, absent corpus blocking, and consumer-gate enforcement without running Lean/Lake or exposing proof bodies.

private_state_exclusion_rules.lean_lake: not executed; corpus readiness metadata only
private_state_exclusion_rules.mathlib: availability may be reported only from a passing import probe and cannot authorize dependent proof work
private_state_exclusion_rules.proof_bodies: forbidden; negative fixtures may carry synthetic forbidden-key rows only and generated receipts may record key names only
private_state_exclusion_rules.private_source_refs: forbidden except public-safe path-level macro lineage refs

authority_ceiling: public synthetic corpus readiness fixture only; not Lean/Lake execution, Mathlib proof authority, corpus benchmark authority, provider authority, runtime correctness, or release readiness
anti_claim: This fixture manifest accepts only corpus/toolchain readiness metadata. It does not authorize Lean/Lake, provider calls, proof bodies, public release, hosted-public readiness, publication readiness, recipient work, or private-data equivalence.
